chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الشُّهُورِ الَّتِي تُسْتَحَبُّ فِيهَا الْعُمْرَةُ وَ مَنْ أَحْرَمَ فِي شَهْرٍ وَ أَحَلَّ فِي آخَرَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 208 – The months in which the Umra is recommended, and the one who wears Ihraam in one month and frees in another

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/235)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/235)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) بَلَغَنَا أَنَّ عُمْرَةً فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ تَعْدِلُ حَجَّةً فَقَالَ إِنَّمَا كَانَ ذَلِكَ فِي امْرَأَةٍ وَعَدَهَا رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) فَقَالَ لَهَا اعْتَمِرِي فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ فَهِيَ لَكِ حَجَّةٌ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Hammad Bin Usman, from Al Waleed Bin Sabeeh who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘It has reached us that an Umra performed during the Month of Ramazaan equates to a Hajj’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘But rather, that was regarding a woman promised by Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>. So he<sup>saww</sup> said to her: ‘Perform Umra during a month of Ramazan, so it would be a Hajj for you’.
en.sarwar: 1. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Hammad ibn ‘Uthman from al-Walid ibn Sabih who has said the following: “I once said to abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘It is narrated to us that performing al-‘Umrah in the month of Ramadan is equal to al-Hajj. He (the Imam) said, ‘This was only about a woman to whom the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause, had promised saying, “Perform al-‘Umrah in the month of Ramadan; it will be al-Hajj for you.’””
